issues.title: Session cleanup not triggered automatically
issues.details: Session cleanup only occurs on authentication attempts or validation requests. Consider adding periodic cleanup or cleanup on server shutdown.

issues.title: Environment fallback still uses hardcoded ports
issues.details: While server-provided environment detection is implemented, the fallback logic still uses hardcoded port mapping. This is acceptable as a fallback but could be improved with environment configuration.

summary: Excellent resolution of previously identified issues. All 4 targeted peer review issues (CR-003 through CR-006) have been successfully addressed with robust server-side session management, eliminated code duplication, proper DOM event handling, and server-provided environment detection. The implementation maintains backward compatibility while significantly improving security and code quality. Only minor optimizations remain.
